features: 🔒 Security hardening: XSS protection, JSON validation, ML model verification, eval() guards
🧮 DTU Dynamics Engine: Laplacian stability, Boolean networks, simulation, Monte Carlo, intervention analysis
🤖 ML Phase 2 pipeline: 3-stage fallback (ensemble → v2 → v1 → rules) with graph features
♿ WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility: ARIA landmarks, keyboard navigation, focus traps, screen reader support
🌍 9 languages: Norwegian and Greek translations substantially completed (~2500+ entries)
📦 Module decomposition: AI assistant (-42%), CLD visualization (-23%), ISA entry (-25%)
🔗 Unified event bus: ISA → CLD → Analysis auto-propagation re-enabled
🧪 Comprehensive testing: 1,300+ tests, visual regression, load testing infrastructure
📐 Shared UI component library with 8 reusable builders
📊 Analysis modules now show stale-data warnings when ISA data changes
👍 ML prediction feedback UI (thumbs up/down) for active learning
📋 Standardized error messages with format_user_error() across all modules
📄 DESCRIPTION file with all 35 dependencies formally declared
🧹 631 deprecated stringsAsFactors calls removed, trailing commas fixed
📝 Roxygen2 documentation for 14 previously undocumented functions

critical.impact: User-supplied data rendered as raw HTML
critical.resolution: Added htmlEscape() in R and escHtml() in JS for all dynamic content

critical.impact: ISA → CLD auto-propagation was completely disabled
critical.resolution: Unified to single event bus API, re-enabled reactive pipeline

critical.issue: CLD showing 0 edges despite connections defined
critical.impact: Adjacency matrix naming mismatch between ISA entry and CLD generator
critical.resolution: Added get_matrix() helper checking both naming conventions

improvements.resolution: Added warning showing which elements lack connections before finishing
Changed status from 'warning' (yellow) to 'secondary' (gray) for contrast
Added common.buttons.got_it key in all 9 languages

migration_notes: No breaking changes - all changes are backward-compatible
Event bus API unified: modules should use emit_isa_change()/on_isa_change()
format_user_error() is now the standard for user-facing error notifications
All modules now have event_bus = NULL parameter (optional, backward-compatible)
shiny.i18n::usei18n(i18n) added to all module UI functions
developer_notes: Use format_user_error(e, i18n, context) for user-facing errors, not paste('Error:', e$message)
Use debug_log(message, category) instead of cat() for all debug output
All analysis modules should subscribe to event_bus$on_isa_change() for stale-data warnings
See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for 10 architecture decision records
ML inference uses 3-stage fallback: ensemble → v2 → v1 → rules
DTU dynamics functions are in functions/ses_dynamics.R (11 public functions)
UI components library in functions/ui_components.R (8 reusable builders)
deployment_notes: Set MARINESABRES_VERIFY_MODELS=TRUE in production for ML model checksum verification
Run scripts/generate_model_checksums.R after updating trained models
Translation cache (_merged_translations.json) will regenerate on first startup
Full server restart recommended to pick up event bus unification
renv::init() recommended for reproducible package management
